description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden bungalow with faded blue horizontal siding and a weathered, snow-dusted gable roof. The roof is dark, corrugated, and features a prominent black chimney on one side. The front facade has two sets of double-paned windows with greenish trim and a central wooden door, all showing signs of age and exposure. The base of the structure is slightly raised and appears to have some dirt or weathering along the bottom edge. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, while the sides have fewer windows and simpler detailing. The overall appearance suggests a rustic, utilitarian dwelling suited for cold climates.
description: A weathered blue wooden bungalow with a snow-dusted gable roof, green-trimmed windows, and a central door. The structure is rustic and compact, with symmetrical front windows and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sets of double windows with green trim, a central door, and the chimney visible on the left roof slope.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the plain blue siding, the gable end of the roof, and the chimney silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with a single window, blue siding, and the roof's corrugated texture and snow accumulation.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the gable roof, blue siding, and no visible windows or doors.
